name: Pacira BioSciences, Inc.
business: Pacira BioSciences sells three non-opioid pain treatments: EXPAREL (bupivacaine liposome) for postsurgical pain, ZILRETTA (triamcinolone acetonide extended-release) for osteoarthritis knee pain, and iovera (cryoanalgesia device) for pain control. The products are primarily marketed in the United States.

exposures.sentence: EXPAREL is a long-acting, non-opioid proven to manage postsurgical pain.
ZILRETTA is the first and only extended-release, single-shot corticosteroid IA injection therapy for OA knee pain.
iovera is our novel, handheld device for delivering immediate, long-acting, drug-free pain control using precise, controlled doses of cold temperature to a targeted nerve.

We are also advancing an innovative pipeline that includes PCRX-201 (enekinragene inzadenovec), a novel, locally administered gene therapy that is in Phase 2 clinical development for the treatment of OA of the knee.

catalysts.event: PCRX-201 Phase 2 ASCEND Part A interim analysis results
catalysts.sentence: We recently achieved our enrollment target for Part A of the study and expect to report results from a pre-specified interim analysis before the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: LG Chem marketing authorization filings for EXPAREL in South Korea and Thailand
catalysts.sentence: LG Chem plans to file for marketing authorizations in South Korea and Thailand in 2026.

catalysts.event: ZILRETTA shoulder OA Phase 3 interim analysis
catalysts.sentence: An interim analysis later this year will inform next steps for our study.

tamClaims.claim: Symptomatic knee OA affects 15 million individuals in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: There are 15 million individuals in the U.S. who have symptomatic knee OA, and nearly two million are under the age of 45.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 1 million pediatric procedures per year in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately one million pediatric procedures per year in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Third molar extractions performed in up to 5 million patients annually.
tamClaims.sentence: Third molar (wisdom tooth) extractions are among the most common dental procedures in the U.S. and are performed in up to 5 million patients every year.

tamClaims.claim: Annually 28-30 million Americans seek treatment for chronic back pain, with only 2-3 million undergoing interventional procedures.
tamClaims.sentence: Annually, 28 to 30 million Americans seek treatment for chronic back pain, yet only 2 to 3 million undergo interventional procedures.

tamClaims.claim: OA affects over 32.5 million adults in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the CDC, OA affects over 32.5 million adults in the U.S.
